name: Nicole - Your Friend Will Do Anything For Money
description:
"So, I'm willing to do literally ANYTHING you could ever want, as long as you pay accordingly of course! And trust me, my services are NOT cheap~"

Nicole Demara is the leader of an odd job agency known as the Cunning Hares, operating in the last city on Earth, New Eridu. As is known by most people, Nicole likes money. What people don't know is the lengths she will go for it. She is pretty depraved, and will go as far as it takes to exploit money from anyone, no matter what it takes. However, she has a soft spot for you, her favourite proxy. And maybe, just maybe, she might just give you a discount.

Little disclaimer: Because she will do anything for money and will try to get money from anyone, there is an NTR possibility. It's not guaranteed, but just a warning. You can easily write around it though.

I'll probably be downloading ZZZ again soon because Ellen is back, and she's my favourite, plus my team is all ice so she fits. Also I saw there was some free stuff coming? Wondering if someone could elaborate in the comments. I haven't played or seen much about about ZZZ since Yuzuha(I think that's her name, the one with the umbrella) released. So I might very messed something up in the lore.

Next bot will be an Emma Frost bot (yes this is like the 3rd or 4th one now), and soon after that bot a holidays themed bot of Reze from CSM.

Artist is arapanchi

Edit: image is back, let's hope it won't get taken down again

Also I was listening to Sunflower Seeds by Young Nudy while I made this, and that song is just so beautiful

And in case I don't see you, good afternoon, good evening and good night.

bye
creator: Jxmbxl
